## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Chainlink Labs and GrowthX to discuss AI-driven SEO and content optimization services.](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Chainlink Labs is exploring AI search optimization but has robust in-house content and data science teams](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content strategy and creation services, not just prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [No immediate fit identified, but potential for future partnership as Chainlink's needs evolve](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing a proprietary platform to augment their services, soon to be client-facing](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

## Topics

### Company Introductions

  - [GrowthX: AI-powered content and growth platform with agency services](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Chainlink Labs: Blockchain company serving diverse clients from DeFi to major banks](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Both companies based primarily in California, with some remote team members](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

### Chainlink's Current AI SEO Approach

  - [Manual process of generating prompts and analyzing results](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [In-house data science team audits findings](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Content team optimizes existing content or creates new based on AI search insights](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Added AI-specific sitemap to website](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [End-to-end content strategy and creation powered by AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Start with editorial content to establish voice, tone, and topics](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Use jobs-to-be-done framework to identify key personas and challenges](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Leverage tools like Scrunch for competitor analysis and prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Proprietary platform with customizable workflows for research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [Strategy sprint: 6-8 weeks, $20K, develops 6-month roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Aimed at longer-term partnerships, but sprint can provide standalone value](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [Not offering isolated prompt tracking services](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)

### Potential Fit Discussion

  - [Chainlink has robust in-house teams, making full GrowthX service less necessary](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [GrowthX works with larger teams too (e.g., Ramp, Abnormal Security)](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [No immediate fit identified, but potential for future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2132.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chainlink to reach out if specific needs arise in the future](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [Chainlink expressed interest in attending future GrowthX workshops or webinars](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to share more educational content and insights publicly soon](https://fathom.video/share/2u4XB9DneCoNwEz7MxyVXvEn5hHpVbPt?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
